name: Koo Duerd
overview: In Nam-ngam District, a northern border area rich in natural resources and kind-hearted people, a large river separates two long-time friendly neighboring countries. The village has a peaceful temple, where a boy named Dam was abandoned by his mother and left in the care of Luang Por Singto, the temple abbot. Luang Por raised Dam well and taught him martial arts like Muay Thai and Krabi Krabong, which he had mastered before becoming a monk.

trailers.title: คู่เดือด เริ่ม 7 ก.ย. นี้ 08.25 น. | Ch3Thailand
